model.notes: VieNeu-TTS v3 Turbo explicitly lists English-Vietnamese code switching as a strength.

inputs.text: Hôm nay chúng ta sẽ test PNG Studio với một câu có cả tiếng Việt và English words trong cùng một đoạn.

expected.output: A single utterance that switches between Vietnamese and English text.
manualChecks: Vietnamese and English segments are both spoken.
The model does not spell out common English words letter by letter unless expected by the model.
The transition between languages is usable for a mixed-language prompt.
